name: appointment_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, this is a reminder that your appointment at Bell Behavioral Health is scheduled for {{2}} at {{3}}. Reply CONFIRM to confirm or RESCHEDULE to change.

name: intake_welcome
body_text: Welcome to Bell Behavioral Health, {{1}}. We are looking forward to supporting your mental health journey. Your intake paperwork is available at {{2}}.

name: telehealth_link
body_text: Hi {{1}}, your telehealth session link for {{2}} is ready: {{3}}. Please join 5 minutes early to test your audio and video.

name: billing_statement
body_text: Hi {{1}}, your statement for {{2}} is available in the patient portal. Please log in at karenbellpmhnp.com/portal or call (954) 555-0100 with questions.

name: newsletter_announcement
body_text: Hi {{1}}, the latest issue of Dr. Bell's Mind Matters newsletter is out now. Read it here: {{2}}. To unsubscribe reply STOP.

name: speaking_event_promo
body_text: Join Dr. Karen Bell PMHNP-BC at {{1}} on {{2}}. Topic: {{3}}. Register at karenbellpmhnp.com/events.

name: appointment_confirmation
body_text: Thank you {{1}}. Your appointment at Bell Behavioral Health on {{2}} at {{3}} is confirmed. We look forward to seeing you.

name: appointment_cancellation
body_text: Hi {{1}}, your appointment at Bell Behavioral Health on {{2}} has been cancelled as requested. To rebook, call (954) 555-0100 or visit karenbellpmhnp.com/portal.

name: intake_forms_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, we noticed your intake paperwork for Bell Behavioral Health is not yet complete. Please finish it at {{2}} at least 24 hours before your first visit.

name: prescription_ready
body_text: Hi {{1}}, Dr. Bell has sent your prescription to {{2}}. Please allow your pharmacy time to process it before pickup.

name: refill_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, your medication refill may be due soon. If you need a refill before your next visit on {{2}}, please reply or call (954) 555-0100.

name: measurement_check_in
body_text: Hi {{1}}, please take a moment to complete your PHQ-9 and GAD-7 check-in before your appointment on {{2}}. Access it here: {{3}}.

name: new_patient_waitlist
body_text: Hi {{1}}, thank you for your interest in Bell Behavioral Health. You are on our new-patient waitlist. We will reach out as soon as {{2}} availability opens.

name: insurance_verification
body_text: Hi {{1}}, we are verifying your {{2}} coverage for your upcoming visit. Please confirm your member ID is current by replying or calling (954) 555-0100.

name: telehealth_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, your telehealth session with Dr. Bell begins in one hour. Join here: {{2}}. Find a quiet, private space and test your connection beforehand.

name: missed_appointment
body_text: Hi {{1}}, we missed you at your appointment on {{2}}. Please call (954) 555-0100 or visit karenbellpmhnp.com/portal to reschedule.

name: cme_workshop_promo
body_text: Hi {{1}}, registration is open for Dr. Bell's CME workshop on culturally responsive psychiatric care on {{2}}. Earn {{3}} contact hours. Details at karenbellpmhnp.com/cme.

name: study_guide_launch
body_text: Hi {{1}}, Bell Clinical Press has released a new study guide: {{2}}. Preview it at karenbellpmhnp.com/press. Reply STOP to opt out.

name: satisfaction_survey
body_text: Hi {{1}}, thank you for visiting Bell Behavioral Health. We value your feedback. Please take our brief survey: {{2}}.

name: holiday_hours_notice
body_text: Hi {{1}}, please note Bell Behavioral Health will have adjusted hours on {{2}}. For urgent mental health support, call or text the 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline.
